images.depicts: child's hand pointing at mat, cat looking away unimpressed
hand pointing insistently, cat crouched with tail flicking
hand pointing a third time; Sam (fuzzy-haired variant) watching; ant tiny at bottom-left; no cat visible in frame
images.issue: cast drift — this Sam figure (yarn/fuzzy hair, tan outfit) doesn't match the painted-wood peg-doll boy design used elsewhere; cat is absent from the shot

images.depicts: cat wedged smugly inside a red baseball cap
cat sitting innocently in a small sandpit
cat lounging in/on an open metal tin
cat with Sam and Segina (round-ball-head variant) and two ants on the mat
images.issue: two ants visible instead of one; Sam design (round ball head) again differs from other weeks' painted-wood boy

images.depicts: cat sitting prim and proud on woven mat, looking up
small snow igloo with archway doorway
green inchworm arched on a vine

images.issue: hallucinated garbled watermark/signature text in bottom-right corner

images.depicts: potato sitting on mat, cat staring at it betrayed

wrong_art.issue: hallucinated garbled watermark text baked into the render
wrong_art.fix: reroll — mj_prompt: a toy doctor's syringe injection with clear glass barrel and blue liquid, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical, no text or watermark --ar 3:2 --style raw

line_map.line: The cat sat in a tin! (a tin?!)
The cat sat in a cap! (a cap?!)
The cat can sit! It sat on the mat! (at last!)
A potato sat on the mat! (POTATO!)
